# ArkLib proof-debt ledger (generated by scripts/audit_ledger.py)

Goal: zero `sorry`/`admit`, zero `axiom`, zero `native_decide`, and every
Residual/Conjecture Prop surface either **proven**, **deleted**, or honestly
documented as open research with the paper trail.

The residual columns use the strict census from `scripts/residual_census.py`: only
`def <Name>Residual ... : Prop` declarations are counted as residual Prop surfaces.
Provider theorem names and residual-like helper declarations are not counted here;
the census JSON records 42 residual-like near misses separately.

Strict residual census: **104** total, **27** open, **77** discharged.

| subsystem | sorry/admit | native_decide | axioms | residual Prop defs | open residual Prop defs | conjecture Prop defs |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Data/CodingTheory | 0 | 0 | 0 | 21 | 9 | 7 |
| OracleReduction/Composition | 0 | 0 | 0 | 17 | 2 | 0 |
| OracleReduction/FiatShamir | 0 | 0 | 0 | 24 | 8 | 0 |
| ProofSystem/Fri | 0 | 0 | 0 | 3 | 1 | 0 |
| ProofSystem/Logup | 0 | 0 | 0 | 14 | 3 | 0 |
| ProofSystem/Stir | 0 | 0 | 0 | 3 | 0 | 0 |
| ProofSystem/Whir | 0 | 0 | 0 | 2 | 2 | 2 |
| ToMathlib | 0 | 0 | 0 | 20 | 2 | 0 |
| **TOTAL** | **0** | **0** | **0** | **104** | **27** | **9** |
